summary: M5 cutover + production promotion decision packet delivered. zh-TW packet documents PostgreSQL read-path cutover (A1–A10 entry conditions, rollback triggers, signoff checklist, observation window) and vector production promotion (B1–B8 entry conditions, dedupe/resume requirements, rollback manifest drill, signoff checklist). Fallback section explicitly retains JSONL canonical and vector smoke-only modes when conditions are not met. Machine-readable go/no-go checklist JSON enumerates current status per item with operator action protocol.

artifacts.description: Section A (PostgreSQL cutover): A1–A10 entry conditions, rollback triggers, 4-bullet signoff checklist, 24h observation window. Section B (vector production promotion): B1–B8 entry conditions, requiredRolloutSteps mapping, rollback manifest playbook, 48h observation window. Section C (fallback) keeps JSONL canonical + vector smoke-only when blocked. Section D lists artifacts the next agent receives to claim/close next round.

Machine-readable status table. Items A1/A2/A3/A5/B1/B4 already 'go' from delivered tasks; remaining items 'pending' until operator runs production exercises. Includes rollbackTriggers, operatorActions enum, and CI guard set.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: PostgreSQL read-path cutover packet with conditions, rollback, signoff
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Section A.1 (10 entry conditions), A.2 (5 rollback triggers), A.3 (4-bullet signoff + 24h observation).

acceptanceMapping.criterion: vector production promotion packet with smoke probe, quota, dedupe/resume, rollback, namespace promotion
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Section B.1 (8 entry conditions), B.2 (rollout step mapping + namespace naming rule), B.3 (4 rollback triggers), B.4 (signoff + 48h observation).

acceptanceMapping.criterion: fallback retains JSONL canonical and vector smoke-only when conditions fail
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Section C table + checklist.fallback object (postgresMode=jsonl, vectorIngestionMode=vector-smoke, ciEnforcement=fail-fast-on-cutover-pr-when-status-not-go).

acceptanceMapping.criterion: packet directly consumable by next engineer/agent in ATM claim/close
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Section D enumerates 7 artifacts and gives 3-step entry commands; checklist JSON exposes per-item status for automated review.

nextActions: Operator runs production-grade backfill + parity + governance regression to flip A6/A7/A8 to go
Operator runs vector smoke gate × 5 consecutive runs and rollback drill to flip B2/B5 to go
Operator obtains provider quota signoff and policy trigger confirmation to flip B6/B7 to go
When all items go, next agent claims SANGUO-RAGOPS-cutover-execution work item under ATM start
